common.tagline: Find your perfect tenant. Get found by your ideal home.

hero.title: The Reverse Way to Rent
hero.subtitle: Stop searching endlessly. Let landlords find you.
hero.tenantsDescription: Create your profile and let verified landlords come to you with offers that match your needs.
hero.landlordsDescription: Browse pre-verified tenants actively looking for properties like yours. No more empty viewings.

referral.title: Refer friends and earn points
referral.subtitle: Every friend who signs up with your link earns you points. Use points as discounts on your subscription!

step1.title: Share your link
step1.description: Send your unique link to friends looking for a home or with properties

step2.title: Friend signs up
step2.description: When they register with your link, you automatically earn points

step3.title: Use your points
step3.description: Accumulate points and redeem for discounts on Premium subscription

referral.terms: Each valid referral = 50 points. 500 points = 1 free month of Premium.

features.title: Why RentReverse?
features.subtitle: A smarter, faster, more transparent way to rent

feature1.title: You're in Control
feature1.description: Post what you need and receive offers from landlords who match your criteria.

feature2.title: Verified Landlords
feature2.description: Only verified property owners can contact you. No scams, no fake listings.

feature3.title: Trust Score
feature3.description: Build your profile with verifications and stand out to landlords.

feature1.title: Pre-Verified Tenants
feature1.description: Browse tenants with verified income, employment, and references.

feature2.title: Save Time
feature2.description: No more empty viewings. Connect with tenants ready to rent.

feature3.title: Smart Matching
feature3.description: Our algorithm shows you tenants that match your property perfectly.

hero.title: How RentReverse Works
hero.subtitle: A simple, transparent process for tenants and landlords to find each other

tenant.title: For Tenants
tenant.subtitle: How to find your perfect home

step1.title: Create Your Request
step1.description: Tell us what you're looking for: location, budget, size, and when you need to move.

step2.title: Get Verified
step2.description: Add verifications (income, employment, ID) to boost your Trust Score and stand out.

step3.title: Receive Offers
step3.description: Landlords will send you property offers that match your criteria directly.

step4.title: Find Your Home
step4.description: Accept an offer, connect with the landlord, and move into your new home.

step1.title: Browse Tenants
step1.description: Search pre-verified tenants actively looking for properties like yours.

step2.title: Check Trust Scores
step2.description: Review detailed profiles with income verification, references, and history.

step3.title: Send Offers
step3.description: Found a great match? Send them a personalized offer with your property.

step4.title: Close the Deal
step4.description: Once they accept, exchange contacts and finalize the rental agreement.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of tenants and landlords already using RentReverse

footer.description: The reverse rental marketplace where tenants post needs and landlords find them.
